junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 dependency with Mockito Core 5.
junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.why_exists: Mockito 5 requires Java 11+ and often replaces older testing setups; JUnit 4 is deprecated in favor of JUnit 5/Jupiter in modern stacks.

junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Mockito Core from version 4.5.1 to 5.23.1-SNAPSHOT.
junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.why_exists: Mockito 5 is required for full compatibility with Java 17 and JUnit 5 integration.

junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Mockito Core dependency with Mockito JUnit Jupiter integration.
junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.why_exists: To enable JUnit 5 (Jupiter) integration for Mockito tests, replacing the older JUnit 4 style or standalone setup.
Newer Lombok versions provide better support for newer Java versions and bug fixes.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Add Mockito strictness settings to enforce stricter mock usage policies in JUnit 5.
Add imports for new Mockito JUnit 5 extension classes.
